name: Claude Code Sandbox
postStartCommand: sudo /usr/local/bin/init-firewall.sh; sudo /usr/sbin/sshd -p 2222; tmux new-session -d -s claude 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f /home/node/.claude/ssh/id_ed25519 ]; then cp /home/node/.claude/ssh/id_ed25519* /home/node/.ssh/ && chmod 600 /home/node/.ssh/id_ed25519; fi; mkdir -p /home/node/.claude/ttyd-certs && ([ -f /home/node/.claude/ttyd-certs/cert.pem ] || openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout /home/node/.claude/ttyd-certs/key.pem -out /home/node/.claude/ttyd-certs/cert.pem -days 365 -nodes -subj '/CN=ttyd' 2>/dev/null); ttyd -W -S -C /home/node/.claude/ttyd-certs/cert.pem -K /home/node/.claude/ttyd-certs/key.pem -p 7681 -I /workspace/.devcontainer/ttyd-index.html -t 'theme={"background":"#1e1e2e"}' tmux attach -t claude &
postCreateCommand:
mkdir -p ~/.claude && echo '#!/bin/bash
tmux new-session -A -s claude "$@"' > ~/.claude/tmux-wrapper.sh && chmod +x ~/.claude/tmux-wrapper.sh && mkdir -p ~/.claude/projects/-workspace && ln -sfn /workspace/.claude/memory ~/.claude/projects/-workspace/memory
